tone_guidelines: Be authoritative yet accessible. Use precise financial terminology but explain complex concepts with analogies. Audience expects data-driven insights, actionable strategies, and risk-awareness. Always include disclaimers where appropriate.
audience_archetype: Young professionals, aspiring investors, and personal finance beginners seeking practical wealth-building strategies and financial literacy

platform_hints.youtube: Whiteboard explanations, screen recordings of portfolios, real-time market analysis. Use charts and graphs.
platform_hints.tiktok: Quick money tips, 'things I wish I knew' format, salary transparency, budget breakdowns.
platform_hints.instagram: Infographic carousels on saving/investing, minimalist financial tips, milestone celebrations.
platform_hints.linkedin: Market commentary, career-linked financial strategy, entrepreneurial finance insights.
platform_hints.podcast: Interview-format with financial advisors, deep dives on investment strategies, market retrospectives.
platform_hints.blog: Comprehensive guides with calculators, comparison tables, and downloadable spreadsheets.
platform_hints.twitter: Market commentary threads, contrarian takes, data-driven insights with charts.

engagement_rules: Lead with a surprising statistic or counter-intuitive insight
Use real numbers and scenarios — not abstract theory
Include 'what I would do' personal perspective for relatability
End with a clear next action step the viewer can take today
